description: Los Ninis are the main armed wing of the Los Chapitos faction of the Sinaloa Cartel, composed of young hitmen aged 20-35 trained in urban combat. They operate as security forces for Los Chapitos leaders, and are involved in torture, murder, drug trafficking, and controlling cartel territories. Based in Culiacán, Sinaloa, they were formed to maintain Los Chapitos' dominance over the Sinaloa Cartel.
